landing.heroSubtitle: The complete platform to manage repairs, inventory, billing and much more.

features.subtitle: From repair to sales, from warehouse management to fiscal POS. MonkeyPlan covers every aspect of your business.

repair.title: Repair Management
repair.description: Complete workflow: acceptance, diagnosis, quote, repair, testing and delivery with real-time tracking.

warehouse.title: Smart Warehouse
warehouse.description: Multi-warehouse management with minimum stock, automatic movements, inter-location transfers and barcode scanning.

pos.title: Fiscal POS
pos.description: Integrated POS compliant with Italian regulations with electronic receipts, multi-rate VAT and Fiskaly SIGN IT.

used.title: Used & Trade-ins
used.description: Complete used management: device evaluation, trade-in register, grading and B2B marketplace.

warranty.title: Warranties
warranty.description: Multi-tenant warranty system with catalog, offer during intake, customer history and automatic billing.

crm.title: CRM & Customers
crm.description: Complete customer registry with repair history, purchases, active warranties and automatic communications.

hero.subtitle: Technical support, phone retail, used resale and multi-store networks. A single system for those who really work.

workflow.title: From intake
workflow.subtitle: Every repair follows a structured path, from intake to delivery. No step is forgotten.
workflow.accettazioneDesc: Taking charge with device and customer data

acceptance.label: Acceptance
acceptance.desc: Device intake with photos, IMEI and problem description

diagnosis.label: Diagnosis
diagnosis.desc: Technical analysis and identification of necessary components

quote.label: Quote
quote.desc: Detailed quote sent to customer for approval

repair.label: Repair
repair.desc: Technical intervention with parts tracking and processing time

delivery.label: Delivery
delivery.desc: Customer delivery with warranty and documentation

multistore.title: Built to grow.
multistore.subtitle: MonkeyPlan is designed to work in real multi-store contexts, reducing waste, downtime and confusion.
multistore.puntiVenditaDesc: Manage multiple locations from a single system with differentiated roles and permissions for each operator.
multistore.autonomiaLocaleDesc: Central control and local operational autonomy. Each location works independently.
multistore.trasferimentiDesc: Internal exchanges of parts, devices and accessories tracked, verifiable and organized.
multistore.datiDecidereDesc: Every movement is recorded, every decision is supported by data. Real-time reports and analytics.

centralized.title: Centralized management
centralized.text: Single dashboard to monitor all outlets, with aggregate and individual KPIs.

transfers.title: Merchandise transfers
transfers.text: Move products between locations with complete tracking and automatic stock updates.

autonomy.title: Local autonomy
autonomy.text: Each location manages its own warehouse and repairs, with customizable permissions.

data.title: Unified data
data.text: Customers, products and price lists shared across all network locations.

integrations.title: Integrates with your world.
integrations.subtitle: No lock-in, no forced constraints. MonkeyPlan adapts to your existing ecosystem of suppliers and services.
integrations.footerText: New suppliers can be integrated via import/export, operational flows or API.
integrations.footer: New integrations are regularly added based on community requests.

items.stripe: Secure online payments with credit and debit cards
items.paypal: Fast payments and buyer protection for your customers
items.scalapay: Installment payments: pay in 3 interest-free installments
items.fiskaly: Cloud telematic register for Italian fiscal receipts
items.sifar: Parts catalog and automatic orders from SIFAR supplier
items.foneday: Foneday parts with catalog import and order tracking
items.mobilesentrix: MobileSentrix catalog for premium quality parts
items.sibill: Automatic bank reconciliation and collection management
items.valutatore: Used device evaluation with market quotations

offer.nessunaCarta: No credit card required. Immediate access to all features.

vision.title: We don't want users.
vision.subtitle: Those who join this first phase are not just users, but active participants in a bigger project: raising the operational standard of the entire industry.

vision.subtitle1: Those who join this first phase are not just users, but active participants in a bigger project: raising the operational standard of the entire industry.

footer.tagline: The operational management system for technical support, retail and used resale.

about.title: The team behind
about.description: MonkeyPlan is a repair management platform designed to simplify your work.
about.subtitle: We are a team of developers and professionals in the technical support sector, united by the desire to transform how repair centers are managed in Italy.
about.missioneDesc: Simplify and digitize the management of technical support centers, eliminating waste and inefficiencies with professional tools accessible to everyone.
about.innovazioneDesc: We develop cutting-edge technologies for the repair sector: integrated fiscal POS, intelligent workflows and process automation.
about.passioneDesc: We were born from direct experience in the sector. We know the daily challenges of those who repair devices and create tailored solutions.
about.affidabilitaDesc: Data security, continuous backups and Italian fiscal compliance. Your data is safe and always accessible.
about.storiaSubtitle: A journey born from field experience and the desire to innovate a sector often neglected by technology.
about.milestone1Desc: MonkeyPlan takes shape from the need for a complete and modern management system for the support sector.
about.milestone2Desc: Ticketing, warehouse, repair workflows and customer management are designed and developed.
about.milestone3Desc: Platform launch with fiscal POS, B2B, marketplace, warranties and supplier integrations.
about.milestone4Desc: Opening of the first 100 free licenses for early adopters of the platform.
about.ctaTitle: Want to be part of the project?
about.ctaSubtitle: Join the first 100 professionals who are redefining the technical support sector in Italy.
about.footerTagline: The operational management system for technical support, retail and used resale.

contact.title: Let's talk about your
contact.subtitle: We're here to help you. Whether you have a question, a suggestion or want to know more, don't hesitate to contact us.
contact.name: Name
contact.emailDesc: Write to us for any questions or information requests.
contact.supportoDesc: Need technical support on the platform? Open a ticket.
contact.supportoDetail: Available via ticket from the dashboard
contact.rispostaRapidaDesc: We respond within 24 business hours to all requests.
contact.assistenzaDesc1: If you are already a registered user, the fastest way to receive support is to open a ticket directly from your dashboard. Our team responds quickly to every report.
contact.assistenzaDesc2: If you are not yet registered, you can create a free account and start exploring the platform right away.

faq.title: Frequently
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about MonkeyPlan. If you can't find what you're looking for, don't hesitate to contact us.
faq.a1: MonkeyPlan is a complete management software designed for technical support centers, phone shops, used resale and multi-store networks. It manages repairs, warehouse, billing, fiscal POS, ticketing, CRM and much more in a single platform.
faq.a2: Yes, the first 100 licenses are completely free. You can use all the platform features at no cost.
faq.q3: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a3: No, MonkeyPlan is a web platform accessible from any browser. No software installation is needed, just an internet connection.
faq.q4: What roles does the platform support?
faq.a4: MonkeyPlan supports 4 main roles: Administrator (complete management), Reseller (sales and distribution), Repair Center (repair management) and Customer (tracking and requests). Each role has its own dedicated staff.
faq.a5: Absolutely yes. MonkeyPlan is designed for multi-store networks with support for multiple warehouses, merchandise transfers, B2B orders between locations and centralized management.
faq.q6: Is the POS compliant with Italian tax regulations?
faq.a6: Yes, our POS supports multi-rate VAT, electronic receipts, daily progressive numbering, lottery code and integration with Cloud Telematic Register via Fiskaly SIGN IT.
faq.q7: How do warranties and insurance work?
faq.a7: MonkeyPlan includes a complete system for managing warranties and insurance: multi-tenant warranty catalog, offering during repair intake, complete customer history and automatic billing.
faq.a8: Yes, we use PostgreSQL databases with continuous backups, encrypted connections and secure session-based authentication. Data is protected according to European regulations.
faq.q9: Can I integrate MonkeyPlan with my suppliers?
faq.a9: Yes, MonkeyPlan supports integrations with suppliers like SIFAR, Foneday and MobileSentrix for automatic catalog import, order management and shipment tracking.
faq.a10: We are developing a mobile app with push notification support via Expo. The web platform is already fully responsive and usable from smartphones and tablets.
faq.a11: Once registered, you can open support tickets directly from the dashboard. Our team responds within 24 business hours. For general information you can contact us by email.
faq.a12: Of course! User feedback is essential. You can send us suggestions through the ticketing system or by email.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Contact us directly, we'll be happy to help you.

terms.title: Terms and
terms.s1Content: "Platform" refers to MonkeyPlan, the management software accessible via web. "User" indicates any natural or legal person who creates an account on the Platform. "Service" indicates the functionalities offered by the Platform, including but not limited to: repair management, warehouse, fiscal POS, ticketing, CRM, B2B orders and marketplace.
terms.s2Content: Access to and use of the Platform are subject to acceptance of these Terms and Conditions. By registering and using MonkeyPlan, you fully accept these terms. If you do not accept, do not use the Service.
terms.s3Content: To use the Platform it is necessary to create an account providing truthful and up-to-date information. You are responsible for the security of your login credentials and all activities carried out through your account. MonkeyPlan reserves the right to suspend or close accounts that violate these terms.
terms.s4Content: MonkeyPlan grants the User a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable and revocable license to use the Platform in accordance with these Terms. MonkeyPlan reserves the right to modify pricing plans with adequate notice.
terms.s5Content: The User agrees to: (a) use the Platform in compliance with applicable laws; (b) not attempt unauthorized access to systems; (c) not use the Platform for illegal, fraudulent or harmful activities; (d) keep their information up to date; (e) comply with tax obligations related to the use of POS and billing features.
terms.s6Content: All intellectual property rights relating to the Platform, including software, design, trademarks, logos and content, belong to MonkeyPlan. The User does not acquire any ownership rights over the Platform. Data entered by the User remains the property of the User.
terms.s7Content: The processing of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy. MonkeyPlan processes data in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR). By using the Platform, the User consents to the processing of their data as described in the Privacy Policy.
terms.s8Content: MonkeyPlan is provided "as is". We do not guarantee that the Service is free from errors or interruptions. MonkeyPlan is not responsible for direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use of the Platform, including data loss, lost profits or business interruptions.
terms.s9Content: The fiscal POS and billing features are support tools. The User is solely responsible for the correct application of current tax regulations, including VAT rates, receipt issuance and electronic submission. MonkeyPlan does not provide tax advice.
terms.s10Content: MonkeyPlan reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be communicated through the Platform or by email. Continued use of the Service after notification of changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.s11Content: The User may close their account at any time. MonkeyPlan reserves the right to suspend or close an account in case of violation of these Terms, with notice where possible.
terms.s12Content: These Terms are governed by Italian law. For any dispute arising from the use of the Platform, the Court of the place of MonkeyPlan's registered office has jurisdiction.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy describes how MonkeyPlan collects, uses, stores and protects your personal data in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).
privacy.s1Content: The Data Controller is MonkeyPlan, based in Italy. For any request regarding the processing of personal data, you can contact us at the email address: privacy@monkeyplan.it.
privacy.s2Content: We collect the following categories of data: (a) Registration data: name, surname, email, username, role; (b) Business data: company name, VAT number, tax code, address; (c) Usage data: access logs, platform actions, preferences; (d) Technical data: IP address, browser type, operating system; (e) Managed device data: IMEI, serial, model (entered by the user for repair management).
privacy.s3Content: Personal data is processed for the following purposes: (a) provision and management of the Service; (b) account authentication and security; (c) Service-related communications; (d) compliance with legal and tax obligations; (e) Platform improvement and aggregate analysis; (f) technical support and ticket management.
privacy.s4Content: Data processing is based on the following legal bases under the GDPR: (a) performance of a contract (art. 6.1.b); (b) compliance with legal obligations (art. 6.1.c); (c) legitimate interest of the Controller (art. 6.1.f); (d) consent of the data subject, where required (art. 6.1.a).
privacy.s5Content: Personal data is retained for the time necessary to pursue the purposes for which it was collected. Account data is retained for the entire duration of the contractual relationship and for the following 10 years to comply with tax and legal obligations. Access logs are retained for 6 months.
privacy.s6Content: Personal data is not sold to third parties. It may be shared with: (a) technical service providers (hosting, database) necessary for the Platform's operation; (b) competent authorities where required by law; (c) other Platform users to the extent necessary for the Service's operation (e.g., contact data between reseller and repair center).
privacy.s7Content: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data, including: encryption of communications (TLS), password hashing, role-based access control, periodic backups, access monitoring.
privacy.s8Content: Under the GDPR, the data subject has the right to: (a) access their personal data; (b) rectify inaccurate data; (c) delete their data ("right to be forgotten"); (d) restrict processing; (e) data portability; (f) object to processing; (g) withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, contact: privacy@monkeyplan.it.
privacy.s9Content: The Platform uses strictly necessary technical cookies for the Service's operation (e.g., authentication session management). We do not use profiling cookies or third-party cookies for advertising purposes.
privacy.s10Content: Data is stored on servers located in the European Union. In case of transfer to third countries, the guarantees provided by the GDPR will be adopted, including the Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission.
privacy.s11Content: The Service is not aimed at minors under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If we become aware that we have collected data from a minor, we will delete it.
privacy.s12Content: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy. Changes will be communicated through the Platform and/or by email. The date of the last update is indicated at the top of the document.
privacy.s13Content: The data subject has the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (Data Protection Authority) if they believe that the processing of their data violates the GDPR.
